news.headline: UPS sees growth in returns with increased volumes, shares surge.

US private sector growth strong in October with S&P Global Flash PMI at 54.3, services at 55.3, and manufacturing at 47.8. Inflation easing below 2% target, boosting business confidence post-election.
news.summary: The latest PMI data from S&P Global for October shows strong growth signals in the U.S. private sector. Business activity in services exceeded expectations, while manufacturing contracted at a slower rate than anticipated. Input costs and prices charged are showing signs of slowing inflation, particularly in the service sector. Key data highlights include the Composite PMI increasing to 54.3 in October, Services PMI rising to 55.3, and Manufacturing PMI improving to 47.8. Despite manufacturing still being in contraction territory, the slower decline indicates a reduced pace. Business confidence is on the rise, indicating optimism for a stable economic environment post-election.

news.headline: Centers for Advanced Orthopaedics opens new Summit Orthopedics location at Foxhall Square in Washington, D.C. on Nov 14.
news.summary: Starting on November 14th, 2024, in Bethesda, Maryland, the Centers for Advanced Orthopaedics (CAO) will be opening a new location to improve access to specialized orthopedic care in Washington, D.C. This move aims to provide quality services to more patients. The CAO is recognized as one of the largest orthopedic care providers in the country. The new location is expected to facilitate increased orthopedic care availability, catering to the growing demand in the region.

news.headline: Fluorosurfactants market to hit USD 6.0B by 2031 due to demand in automotive, aerospace, electronics industries.
news.summary: The Fluorosurfactants Market is experiencing growth due to various factors. The demand for advanced chemicals in industries like automotive, aerospace, and electronics is driving this growth. Fluorosurfactants, known for their superior surface tension reduction properties, are in high demand. The market value is expected to reach $800 million by 2025, with a projected annual growth rate of 6%. The automotive sector alone accounts for 40% of the market share, indicating a significant opportunity for market expansion.

news.headline: Northrop Grumman's Q3 earnings: Revenue $9.996B, missed estimate; Earnings $7 per share, beat estimate $6.08.
news.summary: Northrop Grumman Corp (NYSE:NOC) recently released its third-quarter financial results, with revenue totaling $9.996 billion, falling short of the expected $10.181 billion. Nevertheless, the company exceeded earnings projections with $7 per share, surpassing the estimated $6.08 per share. The growth was driven by a 4% increase in Aeronautics Systems sales, largely from heightened F-35 production. Defense Systems sales rose by 2% due to increased activity within the Sentinel program and Stand-in Attack Weapon program. For further details, the complete report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dover Q3 earnings miss at $1.984B revenue, 5.6% booking, adjusted EPS $2.27; outlook reduced to $8.08-$8.18 for 2024.
news.summary: Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) saw a decline in shares after reporting its third-quarter results. Revenue reached $1.984 billion, marking a 1% increase compared to the previous year but falling short of the expected $2.045 billion. Segment earnings margin grew to 22.6% from 21.9% year-over-year, while total adjusted segment EBITDA margin rose to 24.4% from 23.7% in the previous year. Bookings were up 5.6% year-over-year at $1.853 billion. Adjusted EPS rose by 6% to $2.27 from the previous year but missed the consensus estimate of $2.29. The company generated $353.2 million in operating cash flow and $315.5 million in free cash flow for the quarter. Looking ahead to 2024, Dover revised its adjusted EPS outlook from $9.05 - $9.20 down to $8.08 - $8.18 (consensus of $8.84) and made adjustments to its revenue growth forecast.

news.headline: India may ban Bitcoin and Ethereum for a central bank digital currency, citing risks. Regulators lean towards prohibiting private cryptos, focusing on their own digital rupee. More on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: India is considering banning private cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum in favor of its own central bank digital currency (CBDC). Government officials are leaning towards this move due to the significant risks they see in private cryptocurrencies, including stablecoins. A government official stated that CBDCs offer more benefits than cryptos without the associated risks. This decision comes as India prepares a discussion paper on crypto regulation. The move reflects concerns about the instability of stablecoins, which are pegged to assets like gold or fiat currencies. Regulatory institutions in India are advocating for the ban on private cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Axiom Foods responds to US market challenges after Chinese tariff with new North America Vegotein™ N Neutral production.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 24, 2024, it was reported that the pea protein market in the United States has encountered notable supply difficulties following the enforcement of high tariffs on Chinese imports in 2023. These tariffs, escalating to 270% for antidumping measures and 340% for countervailing duties, were applied retroactively affecting the market dynamics.

news.headline: NASA's work boosts US economy by $75.6 billion through Moon to Mars approach, driving growth nationwide.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, NASA revealed that its endeavors, particularly the Moon to Mars exploration strategy, are propelling scientific and technological advancements for the Artemis Generation. These efforts have not only led to substantial economic expansion throughout the United States but are also fostering innovation and progress. This announcement came on Thursday, marking a pivotal moment in NASA's third phase of development.

news.headline: Bion Environmental Technologies, Inc. (OTC QB: BNET) gives progress update on sustainable livestock production in Montana.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Billings, Montana on October 24, 2024, Bion Environmental Technologies, Inc. (OTC QB: BNET), a prominent player in innovative livestock/organic waste treatment solutions and sustainable livestock practices, provided a significant update.

news.headline: Mayor's flagship policy in a youthful city centers on school lunch program, impacting hundreds of students.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global tourism industry is facing significant challenges due to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. International tourist arrivals have declined by around 74% in 2020 compared to the previous year, representing a loss of approximately 1 billion tourists. This drop has led to a loss of $1.3 trillion in export revenues from tourism. The United Nations World Tourism Organization emphasizes the urgent need for cooperation and support to revive the sector. However, the future of tourism remains uncertain as the situation continues to evolve.

news.headline: German Economy Minister: Tax estimate projections make it all the more important to implement agreed growth initiative measures.
German Economy Minister: Further powerful efforts are needed to effectively increase investment momentum.
Baseus unveils Nomos Series: cutting-edge fast-charging tech, prioritizing user needs - leading the industry in innovation.

news.headline: Pharmaceutical drying equipment market expected to reach USD 8.18 billion by 2029, growing at 7.1% CAGR from 2024's USD 5.80 billion.

This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.1% over the forecast period of 2024-2029. The growth is attributed to advancements in technology and regulatory modifications within the industry.

(NASDAQ: WIMI), shared intriguing news about the application of cluster-based sharding blockchain strategy for collaborative computing. This innovative approach aims to leverage the collective power of distributed computing to enhance efficiency and capabilities in the AR technology realm. WiMi's announcement marks a significant step forward in the integration of blockchain technology into their operations, showcasing their commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements.

news.headline: Biologics market expected to reach $1.79 trillion by 2031 with CAGR of 18.2%. Growth driven by outsourcing ops.
news.summary: The biologics market has seen significant growth attributed to the increasing trend of outsourcing manufacturing operations. A recent comprehensive report by The Insight Partners revealed that the global biologics market is experiencing a surge in demand. Key factors driving this growth include a detailed analysis of products, applications, sources, manufacturing methods, and geographic regions. The report, released on October 24, 2024, highlights the preference for outsourcing production processes. This trend has propelled the market forward, with notable figures indicating a substantial increase in market size and revenue. The analysis provides valuable insights into the biologics sector, offering a comprehensive overview of the industry landscape.

news.headline: Ole-Eirik Lerøy to step down as Mowi ASA Chairman after 15 years; Ørjan Svanevik proposed as successor.
news.summary: In Bergen on 24 October 2024, Mowi ASA has disclosed that Ole-Eirik Lerøy will be resigning from his position as Chairman of the Board after serving for fifteen years. Ørjan Svanevik has been nominated as the potential successor to Lerøy in this leadership role at the company.

news.headline: ScrUSDTH25 on BitMEX now uses Fair Price, calculated from Binance, Kucoin, and Bitget spot prices for accuracy.
news.summary: BitMEX has transitioned the Mark Method for SCRUSDTH25 to Fair Price marking, incorporating a fresh index reliant on spot prices obtained from Binance, Kucoin, and Bitget. This new approach aims to enhance accuracy and transparency in the trading process.

Hyatt Centric Santo Domingo opens in Dominican Republic, first in Caribbean, in stylish Ensanche Piantini neighborhood.

Guests can partake in upscale shopping, dining, and entertainment experiences, with the convenience of being close to the UNESCO World Heritage Site.

news.headline: October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month. Advocates discuss reducing disparities in the Black community. (Characters: 85)
news.summary: Volunteers Danyelle Musselman and Flecia R. Brown from the American Cancer Society and American Cancer Society Cancer Action Network recently addressed the importance of engaging in research and advocacy to diminish cancer disparities for upcoming generations. Their discussion took place in Atlanta on October 24, 2024. This initiative aims to tackle the unequal distribution of cancer prevalence and outcomes. Through active involvement, they seek to improve the health prospects of individuals affected by cancer. These efforts are critical as they strive to create a more equitable future in the fight against cancer.

news.headline: Mölnlycke Health Care partners with Transdiagen for wound care innovation in a research collaboration. (Characters: 90)
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on October 24, 2024, Mölnlycke Health Care, a MedTech company globally recognized for its expertise in wound care and management, revealed a new research partnership with Transdiagen (TDG). Transdiagen is a precision medicine company dedicated to creating drugs and diagnostics for various purposes. This collaboration marks an important step forward in the field, combining Mölnlycke's extensive experience in wound care with TDG's innovative approach to precision medicine. news.headline: Private equity firm Sverica Capital Management invests in Electronic Source Company, an aerospace defense electronics manufacturer.
news.summary: Boston-based private equity firm Sverica Capital Management LP revealed their strategic investment in Electronic Source Company (ESC) on October 18. ESC, an electronic manufacturing services company located in Van Nuys, California, specializes in producing high-reliability circuit card assemblies for the Aerospace & Defense and Space industries. The company is ITAR-registered and holds NadCap and AS9100D accreditations. ESC provides defense electronics globally, maintaining a strong position within these key markets.

news.headline: Klarna shareholders remove director amid board tension.
CIBC Innovation Banking extends credit facilities to LumiQ, a Toronto education platform, partnering with over 1,000 corporate firms.
news.summary: In Toronto, CIBC Innovation Banking revealed it has extended credit facilities to assist Vertu in their strategic investment in Toronto's LumiQ. LumiQ, founded in 2016, is a premier technology-driven education platform delivering accredited professional development courses and content to accounting and finance professionals. With a customer base of over 1,000 corporate and accounting firms in North America, LumiQ is well-established in the industry. The collaboration between CIBC Innovation Banking, Vertu, and LumiQ highlights a focus on supporting growth in the education sector and meeting financing requirements effectively.

news.headline: World's temperature may increase by up to 3.1C, according to UN report. #ClimateChange #GlobalWarming
Fed's Hammack cautions that inflation goal not yet achieved.
Ryder System Q3 results: Sales grew 8% to $3.17B, but missed estimates. Earnings fell to $188M, EPS beat at $3.44. Operating cash flow $1.7B, free cash flow $218M.
news.summary: Ryder System Inc (NYSE:R) saw a drop in stock value after releasing their third-quarter earnings report. Sales increased by 8% year-on-year, reaching $3.17 billion, falling short of the predicted $3.29 billion. Fleet Management Solutions revenue decreased by 1% to $1.47 billion, while Supply Chain Solutions revenue rose by 10% to $1.317 billion, and Dedicated Transportation Solutions spiked by 41% to $633 million. Earnings before tax also saw a decline from $213 million to $188 million compared to the same quarter last year. Despite this, the adjusted EPS of $3.44 surpassed expectations of $3.42. Operating cash flow for the nine months equaled $1.7 billion, including a free cash flow of $218 million. Ryder System currently holds $162 million in cash and equivalents.

news.headline: Asset Entities Inc. has until Feb 17, 2025, to comply with Nasdaq Rule 5550(b)(1) regarding listing requirements.
news.summary: A company named Asset Entities Inc. (NASDAQ: ASST), known for its digital marketing and content delivery services on Discord and other social media platforms, as well as a Ternary Payment Platform company, revealed that an extension has been granted to them until February 17, 2025. This extension allows them more time to meet the requirements of Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). This news came out on October 22, 2024, from Dallas.

news.headline: Kargo, a GitOps project, hits v1.0 on Akuity platform, created by Argo founders.
news.summary: A project called Kargo, developed by the creators of Argo and focused on GitOps continuous promotion, has officially launched its version 1.0 on the Akuity platform. This platform originates from SUNNYVALE, Calif. and is distributed via BUSINESS WIRE.

news.headline: US stocks cautious ahead of Lockheed Martin, GM, and others' earnings. Nearly 20% of S&P 500 to report. Markets post gains for 6th straight week. Nasdaq up, Dow and S&P down. Key futures performance: Nasdaq -0.65%, S&P 500 0.00%, Dow Jones -0.48%, R2K -0.90% in premarket. SPY fell 0.50% to $580.71 and QQQ down 0.65% to $492.19. S&P 500 and Dow negative, while Nasdaq positive. AI stocks surged.
news.summary: Wall Street remained cautious amidst a week filled with earnings reports, but the market saw gains for the sixth consecutive week. Notably, nearly 20% of S&P 500 companies are expected to report earnings, with cumulative earnings projected to increase for a fifth straight quarter. Companies like GE Aerospace, Lockheed Martin Corp, 3M Company, Verizon Communications Inc, and General Motors will be watched closely. Futures markets showed mixed performance with Nasdaq 100 down 0.65% while the S&P 500 remained neutral. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust fell 0.50%, reaching $580.71, and the Invesco QQQ ETF declined 0.65% to $492.19. On the previous day, S&P 500 and Dow Jones closed in the red, while the Nasdaq Composite saw gains. AI stocks notably surged. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Baffin unveils Hero Collection for first responders, new protective footwear line. Available now.
news.summary: Canadian footwear company Baffin is thrilled to introduce the Hero Collection in Stoney Creek, Ontario. Launched on October 24, 2024, this new line offers protective footwear tailored for technical and emergency service professionals. The collection is designed to cater to their specific needs, including durability and functionality.

news.headline: Rebellion Energy Solutions expands U.S.-based methane-abatement credits with new ACR issuance and additional project listings, focusing on plugging orphan oil and gas wells leaking methane. #ClimateAction
news.summary: Initiatives are being implemented to utilize private sector funding for plugging orphan oil and gas wells that emit methane. These projects aim to address the underfunded public responsibility of addressing orphan wells by directing net-zero-focused capital from private sources. By channeling private capital into these efforts, the projects target orphan wells that release significant quantities of methane, thus reducing environmental harm.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts US dollar will remain strong amid potential election outcomes, with Republican sweep implying tariff changes that could boost dollar value by 8-10%.
news.summary: As the 2024 U.S. presidential election nears, financial markets are preparing for its potential impact on the U.S. dollar. Past elections have led to a decrease in the dollar's value. Michael Cahill from Goldman Sachs believes that this time, the risks indicate a likelihood of continued dollar strength regardless of whether Vice President Kamala Harris or Ex-President Donald Trump wins the election. In the event of a Republican sweep, there could be significant tariff changes that might affect the dollar. Goldman Sachs' China economics team predicts that a 60% tariff on all U.S. imports from China could generate around $250 billion in revenue. Additionally, a 10% across-the-board tariff, coupled with higher tariffs on Chinese imports, could result in an 8-10% depreciation of the euro against the dollar. Cahill suggests that increased tariffs, particularly on Chinese products, may tilt the terms of trade in favor of the dollar, causing it to appreciate. This could lead to higher import costs, reduced foreign goods demand, and potential benefits for domestic producers who could increase prices.Overall, the U.S. dollar seems poised for strength in various election outcomes, with potential shifts in trade dynamics and tariff impositions influencing market movements.

news.headline: Binance teams up with Paymonade to enable crypto sales to credit/debit cards, enhancing convenience for users worldwide.
news.summary: Binance introduces a new functionality that enables users to directly sell cryptocurrencies to credit or debit cards through Paymonade. This feature aims to improve convenience and accessibility for the platform's worldwide user community.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops as Treasury yields rise; Nvidia stock at risk of sliding from record highs.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones fell due to the ongoing increase in Treasury yields. Additionally, Nvidia's stock is at risk of dropping from its all-time high. These developments are indicative of a challenging environment for investors, with the Dow Jones facing pressure amidst the rising yields. It is crucial for investors to closely monitor these trends in the market, as they have significant implications for investment strategies and overall portfolio performance.

news.headline: I.M.F. declares victory in inflation battle, cautions about emerging risks.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 1,000 individuals in the city were affected by a cyber attack on a popular social media platform. Hackers were able to access personal information, including email addresses and phone numbers, of more than 800 users. Additionally, financial data of about 200 individuals was compromised. The authorities have launched an investigation into the incident and are urging all users to update their security settings and passwords to prevent further breaches.

news.summary: In two weeks, Washington is focused on the future leadership on Capitol Hill. A clear contender is the cryptocurrency sector, poised to exert influence in the coming year.
